normalization.notes: Store modern Georgian Mkhedruli text in NFC. Preserve any Mtavruli or historical forms from sources but defer them from v1 learner display unless a reviewer approves a sign-specific use.

segmentation.pedagogical_units: Mkhedruli letters, ejective and aspirated contrast families, loanword-friendly chunks, and optional Mtavruli sign variants
segmentation.notes: Modern Georgian uses whitespace word boundaries and a mostly one-letter one-sound script. Consonant contrast families are the main sequencing load rather than combining marks or case pairs.
